text:
Market today: Tech is getting hit again - AI names are under pressure and the mood is risk-off. Your chip/tech-heavy book is directly in the crossfire today.

Your holdings: PLTR is the sharpest pain at -17.56% and still flagged SELL - on margin, this hole gets expensive fast. AVGO is your largest position, down -13.18% and flagged TRIM - that combination of size and loss is your biggest dollar risk right now. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history - headline 8 says space stocks are getting punished broadly, and margin amplifies any drop here hard.

Watch: Friday is flagged as one of the biggest volume days of the year - expect exaggerated moves, both up and down, in your names. Keep eyes on whether AI/chip selling accelerates or stabilizes into the close.

Bottom line: Your two biggest problems are PLTR (deep loss, SELL signal) and AVGO (largest position, losing ground) - decide on both before Friday's high-volume chaos makes it worse.
